caption: A man with a large, silver, spiked wig and glasses sits in a studio setting, wearing a white shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders. He wears black headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous small, framed photographs and some clothing items, including a garment with the word "LEE" visible. On-screen logos appear in the lower portions of the frames, including a red and white graphic that reads "BOSS TALK 101" and a smaller black and white logo that says "PODCAST". As the scene progresses, the man's facial expression shifts slightly as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing while he maintains a forward gaze. The camera angle remains static, focusing on the man from the chest up.
